The fully-equipped kitchen allows you to prepare delicious meals to share in the spacious living room, which opens onto the outdoors. On the solarium, you will find a furnished, covered lounge area where you can enjoy the sun and spend pleasant evenings with friends. For the ultimate in comfort, every room is air-conditioned, and Wi-Fi is available throughout the house so you can stay connected with ease. It should be noted that work is still in progress around the villa. ## Access Villa ALMAR BLANCA is easily accessible and designed for a stress-free stay. Located on one level, it is suitable for all travellers, including families with children. Parking is easy and convenient, with spaces available in the street in front of the house. Ideally located, the villa is within walking distance of the village centre, where you'll find all the essential shops. Within a 10 minute walk to the local supermarket, bars and restaurants. The villa sleeps 6 people. For stays of 10 nights or less, it is considered a Tourist Property - Tourism Contract. For stays of more than 10 nights, it is considered a seasonal rental in accordance with Decree Law 9/2024 of the Generalitat Valenciana, and a seasonal rental contract must be signed. The villa has 3 bedrooms and sleeps 6 people. You walk in to the large open plan lounge, dining area and kitchen. There is free internet and Spanish TV. The property stands in its own grounds with orange, pear & lemon trees, barbeque area and superb private pool where you can enjoy leisurely afternoons on the shaded patio and if it gets too hot step inside to fully air conditioned accommodation. If its beaches you are looking for you have some of Spain's finest closeby - La Marina (10 mins), Guardamar (10 mins), Santa Pola (15 mins), Torrevieja (25 mins), La Zenia (40 mins). If its golf your after Costa Blanca have some of the finest courses in Spain and we are told there are 30 courses within 1 hours drive of the villa. 4 Star courses that are well know Villamartin, Las Ramblas and Campomar are only 25 minutes away. With plenty to explore Torrevieja is well worth a visit. The old town with its attractive marina, port and nautical club has a warm and welcoming ambience and will appeal to those who look for a relaxing pace of life in true Spanish style. The shops, markets, bars & restaurants cater for all tastes. The palm tree lined promenade transforms into a bustling market on summer evenings. Ne... La Marina, San Fulgencio with 5 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms and capacity for up to 10 people. Inside the house is very spacious and equipped with air conditioning (hot/cold), internet/WiFi, TV, fully equipped American kitchen and everything you will need for a perfect stay. Outside you have a beautiful private swimming pool and plenty of space for outdoor dining, sunbathing… When you enter the house you have a large living/dining room with American kitchen, two bedrooms, one bathroom, direct access to the back garden where you will find your private swimming pool. Upstairs you have three further bedrooms (the master bedroom has an en-suite bathroom and a large terrace with amazing views of the area), a family bathroom, two of the bedrooms also have private terraces. The villa is ideally situated, close to all the amenities and just 5 minutes drive to the beautiful white sandy beaches! ## FAQs: Cheap villas in San Fulgencio

### Which types of services are offered at the cheap villas in San Fulgencio?

Among the services you can find on Spain-Holiday, it appears that the cheap villas in San Fulgencio have everything that travellers desire! Here, cheap villas generally include a variety of amenities, the most popular being: Wi-Fi (100%), air conditioning (95%), and balcony (86%)... What are you waiting for?

### How do travellers usually rate cheap villas in San Fulgencio?

The cheap villas in this destination are often well rated. 41% of the cheap villas in San Fulgencio have excellent reviews and an average score of 4.5 stars!

### Are the cheap villas in San Fulgencio suitable for holidays with children?

Spain-Holiday's insights reveal that less than 10% of cheap villas in San Fulgencio are child-friendly. Here, it will most likely be easier to find a cheap villa for your next adults-only holiday.

### Are the cheap villas in San Fulgencio suitable for holidaymakers and their pets?

In general, less than 10% of cheap villas in San Fulgencio accept furry friends. We can therefore advise that there are more suitable destinations in Spain for owners and their pets.

### Do the cheap villas in San Fulgencio tend to have an internet connection?

Of course! According to Spain-Holiday's data, 100% of cheap villas in San Fulgencio have an internet connection. This means that you will be able to stay connected at any time!

### What is the average price of cheap villas in San Fulgencio?

A big percentage of cheap villas in San Fulgencio (91%) tend to cost less than £100 per night. This is the ideal destination for reserving a cheap cheap villa!

### Do the cheap villas in San Fulgencio often have a swimming pool?

Certainly! Judging by last year's information, 68% of cheap villas in San Fulgencio have a swimming pool. This is a dream destination for sunbathing and relaxing by the swimming pool! In addition,68% even have a barbecue!

### Are the cheap villas in San Fulgencio suitable for stays in large groups or rather for an escape as a small group?

Judging by last year's information, 100% of cheap villas accept up to four people. Approximately 100% of the cheap villas here have at least two separate bedrooms. San Fulgencio is the perfect destination for taking your little family on holiday!

### When planning a luxurious stay in San Fulgencio, are cheap villas a good choice?

By looking at the holiday rental portal Spain-Holiday, we say that the cheap villas in San Fulgencio are often the ideal option for those who want to enjoy a luxury getaway. Here, 68% of the accommodations have a swimming pool, 73% have a garden and even 0% have a sauna. Also, if what you are looking for is space, 100% of the cheap villas can accommodate big groups, and 73% have green spaces nearby.

### Are you able to enjoy a beautiful view and spend time outside at the cheap villas in San Fulgencio?

86% of cheap villas have a balcony or terrace, and 0% have a view. But it is not very common, so availability can be limited. If this is a priority for you, you should start your research early. Also, don't forget to use the filters to be sure to find the cheap villa that is perfect for you. However, 73% of cheap villas in San Fulgencio have gardens, where you can bask in the sun. If you like to have lunch or dinner outside, and especially if you like barbecues, 68% of the cheap villas have them.

### If you are thinking of travelling to San Fulgencio do you know the best time to do it?

If we look at the characteristics of the cheap villas in San Fulgencio, it is easy to say that this is an ideal summer destination. This is because the data shows that 68% of the properties here have a swimming pool, 73% have a garden and 95% have air conditioning. What are you waiting for? Reserve a cheap villa in San Fulgencio so you can enjoy your holidays.
